grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive right to use System and operate Hotel as Brand Hotel at approved Site
grant_and_term.term: 20 years from Opening Date (new-build); conversion terms set by franchisor
grant_and_term.renewal: None — no right to renew or extend
grant_and_term.reservation_of_rights: Extensive — franchisor reserves right to operate competing hotels/brands inside territory
grant_and_term.existing_hotels: Existing Brand Hotels in territory continue and may be renewed, expanded, or replaced

fees_and_payments.taxes: Franchisee pays any sales/use/gross receipts tax imposed on franchisor for payments received
fees_and_payments.efts: Franchisor may require electronic funds transfer/direct debit

site_and_construction.site_approval: Franchisor review within 60 days; deemed disapproved if no approval within 60 days
site_and_construction.auto_extensions: 90-day rolling extensions unless franchisor provides 30 days notice
site_and_construction.pre_opening_inspection: Within 30 days of readiness notice; at franchisee cost
site_and_construction.comfort_letter: Available at $2,000; first may be free
site_and_construction.maintenance_obligation: Hotel refurbishment at franchisor's direction; $500/month non-compliance fee for tech standards

franchisee_responsibilities.management: Franchisee or approved Management Company must manage; GM required full-time
franchisee_responsibilities.gm_certification: Must complete GM Certification before opening or within 60 days
franchisee_responsibilities.staffing: Franchisee hires, fires, supervises all employees; independent contractor
franchisee_responsibilities.systems: Must purchase/license franchisor-approved PMS, RMS, CRS and maintain current versions
franchisee_responsibilities.reservation_service: Must participate in and honor all confirmed reservations; give first priority
franchisee_responsibilities.loyalty_programs: Must participate in all required loyalty/discount/promotional programs
franchisee_responsibilities.pricing: Franchisee sets own rates but must honor all reservations and listed rates
franchisee_responsibilities.no_diverting: Cannot divert business to non-Brand Hotels
franchisee_responsibilities.advertising_approval: All Marketing Materials using Marks must be pre-approved; deemed disapproved if no response in 10 business days
franchisee_responsibilities.guest_complaints: Must satisfactorily address within 72 hours or face $150 fee + guest compensation
franchisee_responsibilities.data_ownership: All Data and Guest Data owned by franchisor; franchisee has non-exclusive use right during term
franchisee_responsibilities.no_timeshare: Cannot conduct timeshare/vacation ownership without consent
franchisee_responsibilities.no_competing_business: Cannot promote competing lodging facility without approval

franchisor_rights.inspection: May inspect Hotel and operations, books, records at any time without notice
franchisor_rights.training: May require initial, periodic, remedial training at franchisee cost
franchisor_rights.consultation: May (but not required to) provide consultation and advice
franchisor_rights.quality_assurance: May conduct QA audits; failure triggers remedial training ($4,000-$6,500) and/or re-inspection ($1,000)
franchisor_rights.delegation: May delegate all obligations to affiliates, agents, or contractors

system_and_standards.modifications: Franchisor may modify, amend, supplement System and Standards at any time, including material changes, at sole discretion
system_and_standards.no_limit_on_changes: No contractual limitation on frequency or scope of Standards changes

marks.ownership: All goodwill and ownership rights accrue to franchisor
marks.modification: Franchisor may change/discontinue/substitute Marks at any time without liability
marks.franchisee_expense: Implementation of mark changes at franchisee expense

records_and_audits.books_maintenance: Must maintain books and records per franchisor requirements
records_and_audits.accounting_statements: Must submit financial reports as required
records_and_audits.audit_rights: Franchisor may audit at any time; franchisee pays audit costs if deficiency found or accounting procedures deficient
records_and_audits.lender_information: Must provide lender information as requested

insurance.bi_coverage: 12 months lost profits including fees to franchisor
insurance.earthquake_flood: 75% replacement cost if in hazard area
insurance.terrorism: Full replacement cost plus lost profits
insurance.boiler_machinery: Full replacement of damaged items plus lost profits
insurance.franchisor_as_insured: Must name franchisor as additional insured
insurance.failure_to_maintain: Franchisor may obtain at franchisee's cost plus procurement penalty

data_privacy.data_ownership: Franchisor owns all Data and Guest Data
data_privacy.franchisee_use: Non-exclusive during term for hotel operation and marketing franchisor products
data_privacy.no_sale: Cannot sell, transfer, or use data for non-hotel purposes
data_privacy.privacy_policy: Cannot publish/revise privacy policy without franchisor consent
data_privacy.breach_notification: Must immediately notify franchisor of data loss/theft/compromise
data_privacy.indemnification: Must indemnify franchisor for data loss or privacy law non-compliance

condemnation_casualty.condemnation: Agreement terminates; franchisor entitled to fair portion of condemnation award for lost revenue
condemnation_casualty.casualty: If exceeds coverage limits, either party may terminate. Franchisor entitled to portion of insurance proceeds for lost revenue.
condemnation_casualty.termination_fee_waiver: Available if: sign termination agreement including release, hotel no longer used as lodging, pay all accrued amounts, comply with post-termination obligations

transfer.franchisor_transfer: No restrictions on franchisor's right to assign
transfer.franchisee_transfer: Requires franchisor approval for all transfers
transfer_conditions: Transferee updates hotel to then-current Standards
Franchisee and owners sign general release
Transferee pays then-current IFF as transfer fee
Transferee enters then-current FA (may be materially different)
transfer.death_transfer: Must transfer within required timeframe meeting all conditions; failure may result in termination
transfer.non_control_changes: Notice required but not consent; assumption fee $1,500-$5,000

curable_defaults.examples: Non-compliance with Standards, failure to pay fees, failure to maintain insurance

triggers: Liquidation, dissolution, or action to liquidate/dissolve
Bankruptcy petition filed by or against franchisee
Cease operating under Brand or lose possession of Hotel
Fail to identify Hotel as Brand Hotel or violate proprietary rights
Unauthorized use of Marks or Confidential Information
Breach insurance, indemnification, data privacy provisions or safety/security Standards
Felony conviction of franchisee or owners

termination.suspension: Franchisor may suspend reservation service, website listing, loyalty programs, and other services as interim remedy

post_termination.de_identification: Cease all Brand use; remove all Marks; change phone/web/listings; allow franchisor inspection
post_termination.pay_amounts_owed: Within 10 days after termination or expiration
post_termination.liquidated_damages: Within 10 days; tiered formula based on timing
post_termination.actual_damages: Franchisor may seek actual damages and attorney fees in lieu of or in addition to LD under certain circumstances
post_termination.survival: Indemnification, confidentiality, noncompete, dispute resolution provisions survive

indemnification.scope: Broad — covers all liabilities, fines, penalties, damages arising from franchisee, Hotel, Site, or Agreement
indemnification.includes_negligence: Yes — even if caused by franchisor's negligence
indemnification.defense_obligation: Must defend and reimburse upon demand; franchisor may control defense at franchisee cost
indemnification.settlement_right: Franchisor may settle any claim at franchisee cost
indemnification.limitation_of_liability: Franchisor has no liability for obligations arising from Agreement or franchisee-franchisor relationship — waiver of vicarious liability claims
indemnification.no_mitigation_required: Franchisor not required to seek recovery from third parties or mitigate losses

dispute_resolution.arbitration: All disputes except indemnification, equitable relief, and enforcement of arbitral awards
dispute_resolution.injunctive_relief: Franchisor may seek in any court of competent jurisdiction without posting bond
dispute_resolution.jurisdiction: Non-exclusive jurisdiction of North Carolina courts for non-arbitrable disputes
dispute_resolution.one_year_notice: Franchisee must notify franchisor of alleged breach within 1 year or claim is waived

force_majeure.applies_to: Franchisor's performance obligations only — extended for period of delay
force_majeure.franchisee_obligation: May be required to close/cease operations during Force Majeure event at franchisor's direction
force_majeure.reopening: Requires franchisor approval of franchisee certification

guaranty.scope: Personal guaranty of franchisee's obligations by principal owners
guaranty.hotel_owner_guaranty: If hotel owned by different entity than franchisee, hotel owner must sign guaranty
guaranty.unlimited: Appears to be unlimited personal guaranty

distinctive_clauses: No noncompete during or post-term — unusually favorable
No renewal right — unusual for hotel franchise
Franchisor owns all Data and Guest Data — broad data ownership
1-year claim notification requirement — franchisee must notify of alleged breach within 1 year or claim waived
Class action waiver — must pursue disputes individually
Franchisor's indemnification includes franchisee's negligence claims — very broad
Force Majeure extends only franchisor's obligations, not franchisee's
Franchisor may modify System/Standards at any time without limit
